title: Custom Error Handlers
description: Take control of errors with set_error_handler().

slides.title: set_error_handler()
Custom Error Handler Example
slides.codeSnippet:
Custom Error: [$errno] $errstr
"; } set_error_handler('customError'); echo $undefinedVar; echo "Script continues..."; ?>

slides.title: Limitations
slides.content:
## Fatal Errors Not Caught

The custom error handler cannot catch fatal errors (E_ERROR) or parse errors. For those, you might use a shutdown function (register_shutdown_function) to catch the last error.

quizData.question: Which function sets a custom error handler?
quizData.explanation: set_error_handler() registers a custom error handler.
